name: polaris-social-poster
description: Multi-platform social media auto-posting plugin. Automatically format and publish content to Twitter, Weibo, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and WeChat Official Accounts using browser automation.

interface.shortDescription: Full lifecycle multi-platform social media automation: publish, delete, search, read, and reply to comments.
interface.longDescription: Allows the AI agent to format and publish content, delete posts, search for posts, read post contents, and reply to comments across 7 major platforms: Twitter, Weibo, Xiaohongshu, Douyin, WeChat Official Accounts, Instagram, and Facebook. Leverages Playwright CDP for secure, human-like automation. Includes deep compliance guardrails via the get_platform_skill tool.
defaultPrompt: Post this update with the image to Twitter and Weibo.
Format this article and publish it to my Xiaohongshu account.
